description_long: This is a sleek, dark sword with a long, sharply pointed double-edged blade that tapers to a fine tip. The blade features angular, aggressive contours and a central ridge, giving it a menacing, fantasy-inspired appearance. The crossguard is ornate, with upward-curving quillons and additional decorative elements that enhance its intimidating look. The handle is straight and appears to be made of the same dark material as the blade, ending in a rounded pommel. Subtle purple accents are visible near the guard, adding a touch of color to the otherwise monochromatic design. The overall construction suggests a weapon designed for both display and combat, with a focus on aesthetics and intimidation.
description: A dark, angular sword with a double-edged blade, ornate crossguard, and subtle purple accents, exuding a fantasy-inspired, menacing appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed blade, symmetrical guard, and central ridge.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the sword's long, slender blade and straight handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blade, guard, and pommel details.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile emphasizing the blade's length and angular features.
attribute_handle_design: straight, dark material, rounded pommel, minimal visible grip texture
attribute_ornamentation: subtle purple accents near the guard
